# ECU Map Studio 1.2.0

This release adds whole-table trend extrapolation, selected-region editing, and a more compact and reliable table workspace.

## Highlights

- Local edge trend fits the nearest 4 × 4 source region.
- Global table trend fits every source cell.
- Limited linear remains available and unchanged.
- Trend extrapolation remains constrained by the configurable maximum edge intervals.
- Source and Result can interpolate a selected row, column, or rectangle using real axis spacing.
- Result now provides the same smoothing, math, comparison, axis, visualization, and export tools as Source.
- Typing a number and pressing Enter updates one selected cell or an entire selected range as one undoable change.
- Table Fit, compact axis labels, resizable controls, and in-cell editing remain readable at dense zoom levels.
- Combo boxes ignore accidental mouse-wheel changes while the panel is scrolling.
- The VS BILINEAR view exposes every difference from the predictable local-linear reference.
- Standard PyInstaller and alternative Nuitka Windows installers are included.

ECU Map Studio performs numerical transformations and cannot determine whether a calibration is mechanically safe. Review and validate every result with appropriate logs and instrumentation.
